name.ja: ダーク・アームド・ドラゴン・パニッシャー

text.en: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 3 DARK monsters in your GY. You can reveal this card in your hand; Special Summon 1 Level 6 or lower DARK monster from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except DARK monsters. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish up to 3 DARK monsters from your GY, then target that many cards on the field; destroy them. You can only use each effect of "Dark Armed Dragon Punisher" once per turn.
